entry.title: Re: How can I validate duplicates in Custom portlet
entry.content: Thanks Jsysel, Do you have any document to do that?

entry.title: Deploying SAP Business Network Supplier Portal with SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Even with the most sophisticated ERP systems, many companies struggle with collaborating with external parties, such as their suppliers. This could take the form of manual, resource intensive processes for sending purchase orders and receiving invoices.

With native integration to SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Network Supplier Portal extends your ERP processes and provides capabilities for near real-time supplier collaboration. It is designed to digitize and automate procurement and invoice transactions, giving organizations visibility, accurate and complete transaction data for reporting, and enhanced compliance.

Not only is the SAP Business Network Supplier Portal natively integrated into SAP S/4 HANA, the deployment process is also designed to align with implementation of SAP S/4HANA. The benefits of parallel deployment include:

  1. Minimized customer effort - leveraging synergies from parallel deployment to reduce the need for customer resources and effort
  2. Faster time to value - go-live with the network at the same time as SAP S/4HANA and be ready to transact with suppliers on Day 1
  3. Pre-defined and rapid deployment - SAP services experts apply industry best practices for pre-defined use cases

Benefits of native integration between SAP Business Network and SAP S/4HANA

Integration lies at the heart of SAP Business Network's capabilities, enabling smooth data exchange and process orchestration between SAP S/4HANA and SAP Business Network. This native integration ensures that critical data flows uninterrupted across trading partners, enabling near real-time data exchange and visibility. Native integration provides the ability scale seamlessly, without the cost or complexity of maintaining middleware or third party connectors.

SAP Business Network Supplier Portal is already available to RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, premium plus customers

RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, premium plus customers have access to SAP Business Network Supplier Portal as an included entitlement. They can leverage the benefits of seamless supplier collaboration at no additional cost. The SAP Business Network Supplier portal comes with deployment services to integrate to their SAP S/4HANA Cloud solution and advisory services for onboarding and enabling suppliers.

Learn more about the SAP Business Network Supplier Portal.

entry.title: Re: SAP社区-上海首次见面会
entry.content: 感谢！

entry.title: Any possibility for extension of Old Project Billing cut off date.?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our clients have several projects in Old Project Billing which have end dates beyond 2024 and the migration of those projects to new project billing is taking considerable time due to complexity involved in projects with different contract types.

The idea is to close the projects with old billing as they complete and keep creating all new projects with new project billing.

Currently, the cut off date to move to new project billing is by 2408. Is there any possibility for extension of Old Project Billing to 2502 Release or beyond.? 

Thanks & regards,

Srinivas

entry.title: SFTP receiver - error Cannot store file cause: java.io.IOException: Pipe closed
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm getting this error Cannot store file cause: java.io.IOException: Pipe closed when uploading files into SFTP folder. It happens randomly.

I'm unable to trace to the root cause.

Has anyone seen this error before? What are possible causes?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hi good morning, I am having the following case

context:
I have SAP CDC as a system to receive information from multiple sources of information from where I get customer data, but one of these sources allows customers to be repeated due to business rules.

So I'm looking for a way from CDC, to remove customers that are duplicated within CDC and leave a single record of that customer that was repeated, I was looking at the option of using Dataflow but it is quite complicated, thank you very much for your help.

#SAP Customer Data Cloud

entry.title: How to convert draft documents to formal documents after modifying the approval status of DI API
entry.content:
Hello Experts:

  I have encountered a problem. After using the DI API to modify the approval status, the draft document status has already been modified, but still one draft document has not been added as a formal document. What should I do or where can I find some relevant information?

entry.title: Don't miss the SAP Sales Cloud V2 Live session on June 10th '24
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

From the SAP Product Learning team, I am excited to announce that we will be hosting a live session series for our innovative and versatile new product, SAP Sales Cloud V2! This set of 3 sessions for 1hr each, will be a fantastic opportunity for all of you looking to improve your knowledge on this new solution from a functionality and configuration perspective.


SAP Sales Cloud V2, as most of you already know, offers an array of excellent features centered around improving your sales processes. It is a Cloud native solution designed for boosting productivity, managing customer relationships smarter, and getting better insights from your data.

In our upcoming series of live sessions, we will dive deeper into the functionality and value proposition of Sales Cloud V2, with live demonstrations, tips, and insights from our expert trainer. You will have an opportunity to ask any questions, raise inquiries and explore the full potential of the tool.

Be sure to secure your spot by signing up as soon as you can. We look forward to having you on board!

See you there!

Note: These sessions require a login with learning.sap.com or an SAP Learning Hub License.

Remember to register to all the three sessions to complete this series of learning.

 



Learning.sap.com


Details of the session


Session 1

In this session you will get an overview of various features in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2

Date: 10 June 2024

Time: 4pm - 5pm CEST


Session 2

This live session will help you learn about the new SAP Sales Cloud Version 2. The following topics will be included: Onboarding, Sales Cloud Version 2 set-up, and Fundamentals including Global Search, Extensibility, User & Control etc

Date: 11 June 2024

Time: 4pm - 5pm CEST


Session 3

This live session covers Sales Cloud Version 2 features in detail, such as Guided Selling, Digital Sales Engagement, Pipeline Management & Forecasting, MS Team integration and Autoflow.

Date: 12 June 2024

Time: 4pm - 5pm CEST

entry.title: How to add PO Item Custom Field for Mass Change of PO
entry.content:

We have added a custom field in PO Item detail level. We need to use this field in the app Mass Changes to Purchase Orders.

How to add this custom field in S/4HANA Public Cloud like ECC, we can add using maintain table views MASSFLDLST

Best Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Billing document is missing(VBRK,VBRP), but have accounting doc created
entry.content:

Now have an issue that I have an accounting doc witch doc type is RV, but when I use the doc number in VF03 got the error message "Billing document xxxxx does not exist"

VF03

FB03

VBRK,VBRP don't have any data of that.

This issue resulted in me having useless AR in FBL3N so now I need to reverse that acc doc but even it's the past accouting period.

please give me some suggestions🙏

entry.title: Re: Data and Analytics Group - Member #100

entry.title: plan order basic finish date in the past/not coincidence with open date
entry.content:
hi everyone

I ran into an werid issue when MRP planning. 

the Ind requirement is in the future 2024/09/10, but the corresponding planning order geneated basic finish date is fall into past date 2023/11/20. for the planned item, it's in-house days is set to zero.  when I run MRP calculation, the parameter is 3-create plann order,3-Schedule lines, 1- create MRP list， 3-delete and recreate planning data. so every time the planning order should be re-generated.

for this generated plan order, only the opending date is correct. we need to align to the opening date!

the requirement is attached to a network. I checked the network dates, and it is also correct.

BTW, because this project created in system is an old one, I modifed the start date and end date in project to apply to newly attached component requirements(PIR) for test.

I dont' know how this happen.. please give some guidance, thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Update task in RAP model API
entry.content: Hi Thomas, yes, this is the normal case. I am just curious about the following description "In the ABAP Cloud development model, the classic update task is not offered anymore." in the blog.

entry.title: Destination error Couldn't check at the moment, please try again later
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using Cloud Transport Management, the following destinations were previously connected via Basic Authentication and received a 200 response.

https://deploy-service.cfapps.<domain>/slprot/<myorg>/<myspace>/slp

As of 2024/5/7 I have tried this and now get the following error when checking the connection. Please let us know if there is a possible cause.

'Couldn't check at the moment, please try again later'.

entry.content:

Appreciate your pointers.

SAP Integration Suite ,

entry.title: SAP Business Bydesign
entry.content:

For example, a Customer Return Notification with 3 Rows may be Goods Reciepts as 3 Inbound Deliveries.

How much coverage can I typically expect with 50GB.. like how many process flows will it typically cover or number of records or number of months of historical data does it cover for a t-shirt size companies of Small, Medium, Large.

entry.title: Re: Redirecting to Build Apps when trying to open SAP BAS...
entry.content: It's working. Thanks you so much @MioYasutake

entry.title: EC Alert notification triggered based on the previous data, not on the current data.
entry.content:
Hello All,

We hired a contract employee (not CWK) on Jan 1st 2023, the contract end date of this employee was on May 31st 2024, then system should send the alert notification 30 days before to the contract end date, which means on May 1st 2024.

After 6 months of service from the hire date, this employee promoted as a permanent employee with effective from July 1st 2023, and we have created an effective dated record in the job information and removed the date from the contract end date field.

As these changes were done on July 1st 2023, our expectation is that as there is no date maintained in Contract End Date field system will not send any alert notification on May 1st, 2024.

But system has triggered the alert notification on May 1st, 2024. 

Please let me know is this the expected behaviour, or am I missing anything in the configuration? below is the business rule we have in the system.

 

Many Thanks,

Hafeez

entry.title: SAP Data Analyst Certification
entry.content:
Certificates won’t get you a job in data analytics.

But you know what might?

The real world skills you gain in the process of getting that certification.

I fell into the trap of certification collecting earlier on in my data career, thinking the more the merrier!

But when it came time for interviews, no one ever asked me about any specific certifications I had on my resume.

Instead, they asked about the tools I learned, projects I built, and how I tied my learnings to my everyday job.

One certification that teaches you data analyst skills in the context of real world tools and business use cases is SAP’s Data Analyst Certification.

Its courses teach you everything you need to work in SAP Analytics Cloud–one of the most popular platforms for analytics and planning.

The best part: if you’re a woman, veteran, career changer, or in a minority group, you’re eligible to take this cert completely free.

Start learning today at 👉 https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-data-analyst-sap-analytics-cloud?campaigncode=CRM-PM24-DAN-2677421&source=socialad-glo-linkedin-influencer-megan

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content: Hi , I am facing same issue. I can't find the link button for my newly added Email address. Please let me know how it is resolved.

entry.title: Re: Multi-Select Field in ByDesign CRM
entry.content:
Dear danovic78 ,

Creating a KUT field in ByDesign where users can select multi values from a dropdown is currently not supported. You can select only one value from the drop down list.

Hope this helps.

Thanks and Regards,

Shubha

SAP Support

2. Pls check if there are any enhancement about the Production order check, you can contact your IT colleague to debug the Transaction code.

SS

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP-based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on-premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment.

Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday 14th June 2024 in Pune, India from 9:00 - 16:00 IST. 

Location: Rialtes Technologies & Solutions LLP, World Trade Center, 119, Tower-2, 1st Floor, Kharadi, Pune- 411014, Maharashtra, India

The event is kindly being hosted by Rialtes Technologies & Solutions LLP, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees. If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page.

The instructors are Developer Advocates Sheena M K and Shilpa Shankar. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Need to configure reverse pricing
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for your prompt reply.

When I am entering Rs118 in PR00 amount including tax, it is showing Rs118 in net value. 

I have created new Z condition type for tax and assigned the calculation type "H" but still not working, it is calculating tax wrongly for z condition. It must calculate 9% of 100 as base price is Rs100 which is Rs9 but it is calculating as Rs9.74.

 

 

Pricing procedure

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: How to set up "triggers" for Volume/Mass regulator
entry.content:
I do not think that you detected gaps here. In case of difficulties please issue an OSS note since I cannot support your project remotely through this channel.

Sorry and kind rgds

Marko

entry.title: Re: Get all the metadata of webi report using pyhton script
entry.content:
Do you want to get the SQL of the webi query? If so, I think this API should be what you want:

GET /documents/<documentID>/dataproviders/<dataProviderID>/queryplan

More details, you can check help guide:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_BUSINESS_INTELLIGENCE_PLATFORM/5431204882b44fc98d56bd752e69f132/fe78458cf8e34524802db4bef738ac16.html

entry.content: 请问报什么样的错误消息？有详细的样例或截图吗？

entry.title: Re: SAC Story : Recent n Dates calculation
entry.content:
Hello @krishnkant,

Another approach could be to simple sort your table descending by the date and change the drill limitation to 10 columns:

You will see the most recent ten dates then.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Redirecting to Build Apps when trying to open SAP BAS...
entry.content:
Hi @Boopalan,

From your screenshot, I see that you have enabled SAP Build Code. This means that your SAP Business Application Studio instance is now linked with SAP Build Code. 

If you are looking for the dev spaces that you have created earlier, you can click on Dev Space Manager. This will take you to the Dev Space Manager page that you are familiar with.

Any projects that you create with SAP Build Code will continue to appear in the SAP Build Lobby.

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content:
Hello @emily_nagengast @anantapalli  : Question 1: Is that possible to setup a condition like when we select certain values as Yes for previous question in Custom Task, then instructions or link to be visible otherwise it should be hidden.

As per last release, we have Rule to enable the SHOW or HIDE fields, but we need to build a JSON code to enable the conditions. We have written the below code but it is not working any suggestions with sample code to make the fields SHOW or HIDE based on previous value selection.

{
"type": "Rich Text",
"Condition": {
"scope": "#/properties/x-laptopCharger",
"schema": {
"expectedValue": "Yes"
}
}
}

Questions 2: Is that possible to bring already captured data from Personal Data collection step like Candidate names, Date of Birth and Start Date in the Custom tasks. So that candidate can review the data and fill additional information?

entry.title: Re: Target cost, planned cost and actual cost in a produc...
entry.content:
Hello,

Target Cost will be calculated once you complete Goods Receipt for Production Order.

For more details on Production Accounting - Target Cost, Please refer below SAP help portal link.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4032610758dc437089f0c28320eec93f/2cd28fce07474837823d81192571e1ac.html?q=calculation%20of%20target%20cost

Thanks and Regards,

Prabha A

entry.title: Re: Error in account determination: table T030K key CAUS VS1 V1
entry.content:
Hey Folks!

Check once maintenance of Table J_1IT030K_V in SM30,

put Charts of Accounts () & Transaction Key JTC

Make combination as per below:

Tax Code/ Business Place/ GL Account/ GL Account

Maintain GL here and check whether it works.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Line loop on Grid excluding first four lines
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I have come up with an interesting dilemma and for the life of me I cannot figure out a clear explanation as to why it is happening.

I am running a loop over the lines on a grid and checking whether the PickedQty > 0, if it is then the line is included in a stock transfer document. This is working perfectly fine if include any lines from the fifth one onwards, however, if I include any one of the first four lines OR if I include any of the first four lines in addition to the fifth line onwards then I still get a success message but no transfer document is made.

When I try any of the first four rows I get the processing line x / x status message so I know the condition is correct for that part of the code to trigger.

try
{

    // Define a flag to track if any rows with PickedQty > 0 are found
    bool rowsFound = false;

    Grid grid = (Grid)form.Items.Item("BOY_1").Specific;
    int rowsCount = grid.Rows.Count;

    // Iterate over the grid rows to check for PickedQty > 0
    for (int i = 0; i < rowsCount; i++)
    {
        int qty = Convert.ToInt32(grid.DataTable.GetValue("PickedQty", i));
        
        if (qty > 0)
        {
            rowsFound = true;
            break; // Exit the loop as soon as a row with PickedQty > 0 is found
        }
    }

    // If no rows with PickedQty > 0 are found, alert the user and exit
    if (!rowsFound)
    {
        application.StatusBar.SetText("No rows with Picked Quantity greater than 0 are selected.", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
        return; // Exit the method
    }

    // Proceed with creating the stock transfer document
    SAPbobsCOM.StockTransfer transfer = (SAPbobsCOM.StockTransfer)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oStockTransfer);
    transfer.DocDate = DateTime.Now;
    transfer.FromWarehouse = "2WM";
    transfer.ToWarehouse = "2WM";

    // Iterate over all rows in the grid and process those with PickedQty > 0
    for (int i = 0; i < rowsCount; i++)
    {
        string ItemCode = grid.DataTable.GetValue("ItemCode", i).ToString();
        string Warehouse = grid.DataTable.GetValue("WhsCode", i).ToString();
        int qty = Convert.ToInt32(grid.DataTable.GetValue("PickedQty", i));

        // Process only rows with PickedQty > 0
        if (qty > 0)
        {
            application.StatusBar.SetText("Processing line " + (i + 1) + "/" + rowsCount, SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
            transfer.Lines.ItemCode = ItemCode;
            transfer.Lines.FromWarehouseCode = "2WM";
            transfer.Lines.WarehouseCode = Warehouse;
            transfer.Lines.Quantity = qty;
            transfer.Lines.Add();
        }
    }

    // Check if any lines were added to the transfer document
    if (transfer.Lines.Count > 0)
    {
        transfer.Add();
        application.StatusBar.SetText("All items successfully transferred", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
    }
    else
    {
        application.StatusBar.SetText("No items with Picked Quantity greater than 0 to transfer", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
    }

    // Release the COM object
    System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal.ReleaseComObject(transfer);
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    // Handle the exception gracefully
    application.StatusBar.SetText("Error: " + ex.Message, SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
}

Hopefully someone else can see some reason I am missing as to why it is doing this, i'm stumped. Happy to provide further context if required.

Kind Regards,

Nick

entry.title: Re: SAC scripting: Change measure based on value of a dim...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Maybe you can achieve that with a little script like that :

Based on Story Filter for this example.

 

var j_harmony = {"KeyOfDimensionElem1":"keyOfMeasuretoShow1",
"key_OfDimensionElem2":"keyOfMeasuretoShow2"};
 
var filter2Use = Application.getFileDataSource("fndTheIdWithTheSelektor").getDimensionFilters("TheDimWhichIsFiltered")[0];
var filterValue = cast(Type.SingleFilterValue,filter2Use);
 
Chart_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter(Alias.MeasureDimension,j_harmony[filterValue]);
 
KeyofDimensionElem1 ist for example the key of Hersteller and the keyOfMeaseurtoShow is the UID of Measure you want to show "connected" with the Hesteller.
 
I hope it helps,. After that you have to decide when you want to start this function... it could be funny ^^ you can first of all build the script based on a button and after that you can study where you start the function maybe onResultChange of your table.... beware of endless loops.

entry.title: Couldn't re-deploy the .mtar file on
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I am creating a CAP based application and am on Step 11 of this tutorial: Prepare SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition Setup | SAP Tutorials

I was able to build the .mtar file, but whenever I deploy the file, it gives this error: 

Content deployment for module "cpapp-destinations" to resource "cpapp-destination" failed: org.cloudfoundry.multiapps.controller.persistence.services.FileStorageException: com.sap.cloud.lm.sl.cf.sap.content.client.ContentDeployerException: Operation 'Deploy synchronously' to the URL 'https://destination-configuration.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/destination-configuration/gacd/v2/deploySync' failed. Remote server responded with HTTP status code 400, error message: 'FORM attribute [content] cannot be blank', error type 'BLANK_FORM_ATTRIBUTE'
Process failed.

Here is the .yaml file: 

_schema-version: "3.1"
ID: cpapp
description: A simple CAP project.
version: 1.0.0
modules:
- name: cpapp-srv
  type: nodejs
  path: gen/srv
  requires:
  - name: cpapp-db
  - name: cpapp-uaa
  provides:
  - name: srv-api
    properties:
      srv-url: ${default-url}
  parameters:
    buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
    readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
    readiness-health-check-type: http
  build-parameters:
    builder: npm
- name: cpapp-db-deployer
  type: hdb
  path: gen/db
  requires:
  - name: cpapp-db
  parameters:
    buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
- name: cpapp-destinations
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: gen/
  requires:
  - name: cpapp-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: cpapp-uaa-key
  - name: cpapp-html5-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: cpapp-html5-repo-host-key
  - name: srv-api
  - name: cpapp-destination
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
          Name: cpapp-app-srv
          TokenServiceInstanceName: cpapp-uaa
          TokenServiceKeyName: cpapp-uaa-key
          URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
          sap.cloud.service: cpapp.service
        - Name: cpapp-html5-repo-host
          ServiceInstanceName: cpapp-html5-repo-host
          ServiceKeyName: cpapp-html5-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: cpapp.service
        - Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
          Name: cpapp-uaa
          ServiceInstanceName: cpapp-uaa
          ServiceKeyName: cpapp-uaa-key
          sap.cloud.service: cpapp.service
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: cpapp-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: cpapp-html5-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - nsrisks.zip
      name: nsrisks
      target-path: resources/
- name: nsrisks
  type: html5
  path: app/risks
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: cpapp-db
  type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
  parameters:
    service: hana
    service-plan: hdi-shared
- name: cpapp-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      role-collections:
      - description: Manage Risks
        name: RiskManager-${space}
        role-template-references:
        - $XSAPPNAME.RiskManager
      - description: View Risks
        name: RiskViewer-${space}
        role-template-references:
        - $XSAPPNAME.RiskViewer
      tenant-mode: dedicated
      xsappname: cpapp-${org}-${space}
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-plan: application
- name: cpapp-destination
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      init_data:
        instance:
          destinations:
          - Authentication: NoAuthentication
            Name: ui5
            ProxyType: Internet
            Type: HTTP
            URL: https://ui5.sap.com
          existing_destinations_policy: update
    service: destination
    service-plan: lite
- name: cpapp-html5-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
  - builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install --production
    - npx -p @Sap/cds-dk cds build --production
    - npx rimraf gen/db/src/gen/data

I'm fairly new to this technology, so please tell me where I'm going wrong, or what can I do to correct this code and deploy my application perfectly. Any suggestions would be appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: Introduction to SAP GRC Process Control: Enhancing Day-to-Day Business Capabilities
Re: How to reset sample determination in S/4HANA Public C...
entry.content:
Hello,

Access the Fiori app Manage Inspection Lots and click on the inspection lot number hyperlink > It pops up a screen where you find a link for cancelling sample determination > Once you click that link, it directs you to QAC3 screen.

PFB screenshot of the same,

Thanks and Regards,

Prabha A

entry.title: Re: How to reset sample determination in S/4HANA Public C...
entry.content: Please check my Answer above with the screenshot where you can find the option to cancel sample determination. Thanks, Prabha A

entry.title: S4HANA Error - Enter Time Ticket for Production Order (Posting period 005 2024 is locked)
entry.content:
Hi all,

Hope I could get some answer to this issue I've in the S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition.

I'm trying to process the Enter Time Ticket for Production Order App, I've keyed in the Activities for the Setup, Machine and Labor and wanting to save but the system returns with an error.

"Posting period 005 2024 is locked (check posting date)"

May i ask where can i open the posting period for this process?

I've checked the Manage posting period App and all period for 005 2024 has been open.

Thank you for your advise.

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content: I installed via requirements:

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device

entry.title: Rounding Whole wts to available qty
entry.content:
Hello expert , 

As i have requirement to pick whole HU from storage type not the partial qty. i tried with all configuration of round wts to available qty in wpt and storage type but still its not working in my scenerio ? please help me out !! 

#sap

Thanks !!

entry.title: Rounding Whole wts to available qty
entry.content:
Hello expert , 

As i have requirement to pick whole HU from storage type not the partial qty. i tried with all configuration of round wts to available qty in wpt and storage type but still its not working in my scenerio ? please help me out !! 

#sap

Thanks !!

entry.title: Re: Product Allocation- Issue with consumed quantity
entry.content:
Hi Stefan,

The product allocation consumption is only linked to the sales order confirmed quantity. The delivery creation has no effect on the product allocation consumption. You could do a change in the sales order and reduce the requirement quantity 100 to the delivered quantity 50 - this action would reduce the allocation consumption.

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Workflow original WF approver and substitute approver
entry.content: When a delegate or substitute approves a work item I want to know the actual approver as well for the step ... Do you know any FM or Table that stores that information

entry.title: Configuration of job-scheduler in BTP with python flask
entry.content:
Hi,

we are struggling with the setup of a job-scheduler for a pyython flask app on cloud foundry in the BTP.

The job must call the app via the approuter.

Following tutorials, we created a check_authorization method with:

 

access_token = request.headers.get('authorization')[7:]
security_context = xssec.create_security_context(access_token, uaa_service.credentials)
isAuthorized = security_context.check_scope('openid')
 
We granted 
 "grant-as-authority-to-apps": ["$XSSERVICENAME(job-scheduler)"] to a scope in xs-security.json and the scope is evaluated to True by security_context.check_local_scope("admin") in both cases (from job and from user)
 
When called via the job-scheduler, the security_context.check_scope('openid') however gives false, when called with a user it is True. 
 
What might still be missing here ? Or do we need to check against another scope than 'openid' in the check_scope ?
 
Any help appreciated.
Regards
Marcus

entry.title: Enhancing the SAPUI5/OpenUI5 Demo Kit Together: A Look into Our Feedback Loop
entry.content:
Greetings, developers!

At SAPUI5/OpenUI5, exchanging ideas within the developer community has always been a big thing. We're all about building a community-driven, developer-friendly ecosystem. We're committed to fostering a collaborative environment where your feedback shapes the evolution of our framework. Your insights, suggestions, and criticisms are immensely valuable, driving us toward continuous improvement. Let's take a closer look at how we capture and act upon your feedback across various channels.

Survey Insights: Your Voice Matters

Our permanent UI5 Demo Kit survey serves as a crucial avenue for gathering your thoughts. This is where you get to tell us how we're doing, what's working like a charm (yes, we want to hear that, too!), and where we might be missing the mark. Although the survey is located in the Demo Kit, but you can also leave feedback for the framework itself. We've got questions about user satisfaction, but more importantly, we've got an open field where you can spill your thoughts freely. Every quarter, we run a more extensive survey for a couple of weeks with more questions to get more insights. By way: This long survey is currently running for Q2 until May 21, so feel free to use this opportunity (see the helpful links section below).

These comments are anonymous, but they don’t just disappear into the digital abyss. On the contrary: Your submissions are meticulously catalogued within our internal GitHub repository where our development teams assess and prioritize them. Some issues are like low-hanging fruit – easy fixes we can implement immediately. Others need a bit more consideration before we can decide whether they find their way into our backlog.

Documentation Dialogue: Collaborating for Clarity

Ever spotted an error or envisioned an enhancement in our documentation on the UI5 Demo Kit? Our Edit on GitHub button in the lets you to initiate changes directly. What sets this process apart is that it’s not a one-way street but also an opportunity to discuss your ideas with you. We welcome your input and value the opportunity to discuss proposed changes to our developer documentation. We've already had some significant contributions from the community in this realm, and we extend our gratitude to those who've contributed to refining our documentation.

Engaging with Our Community

But our feedback loop doesn't stop there. We're not just sitting back waiting for feedback to land in our laps. We actively engage with you through various community touchpoints. Whether it's at events like UI5con, in our open UI5ers live webcast, at customer workshops, or on online platforms such as X, StackOverflow, and Slack: Actively seeking out your opinions and ideas makes us better. See our link list at the bottom of this post.

Many projects and ideas that started out as community ideas for SAPUI5/OpenUI5 projects. Just one example: The transform-modules-ui5 Babel plugin was developed by an individual developer in the community a couple of years ago. It has since become an integral part of our TypeScript toolchain. That’s the spirit! So it’s really important to us to engage with you wherever you come up with your ideas.

And as you know: OpenUI5 is open source, so you can actively improve the core framework itself!

A Big Thank You!

Before we wrap up, we just want to extend a massive thank you to each and every one of you. Whether you've dropped a line in our survey, submitted a PR on GitHub, or had a chat with us at an event, your contribution matters more than you know.

Your feedback isn't just welcomed; it's actively sought after. We encourage you to continue sharing your thoughts and ideas. Open the UI5 Demo Kit today and enter the feedback you always wanted to send us! Or use any other channels we mentioned here. Whether you want us to fix an annoying typo, tell us what we're doing right, or let us know about an idea that you have: Together, we'll continue making SAPUI5/OpenUI5 better.

Until next time, happy coding!

------------------------------

Some Helpful Links:

  • SAPUI5 Demo Kit / OpenUI5 Demo Kit:
    • Feedback Survey at the top-right corner (if you have feedback on a certain page, go to that page first before you start the survey; then you can indicate that your feedback refers to the page you’re currently on)
    • Edit on GitHub link on every page under Documentation

  • Contributing to OpenUI5: You want to contribute to OpenUI5? Please do this here!
  • StackOverflow: Ask questions and receive answers from the community
  • OpenUI5 on Slack: Another community-based communication channel
  • UI5con: Our main community event
  • UI5ers live: Our interactive webcast where anyone can showcase their UI5-related work
  • Follow us on:
    • LinkedIn
    • X
    • YouTube

entry.title: Re: BW4HANA - Objects not visible in BW Repository
entry.content: Hi, I know this thread and its replies are old. But we had this problem after a recent upgrade of our S4 and Shidongs tip via RSOSM solved the problem for us. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an
entry.content:
Hello Olga,

We are using SAP BTP CVA central check setup.

If we raise Exemption for S4 on-premise (checked) system. 

Person having Role SAP_BR_QUALITY_MNGR_SW_DEV sees Exemption approval in FIORI app.

Does SAP provide any Email notification functionality for these Exemption ? how to setup those ?

Thanks

Prashant

entry.title: Career Prospect for NonSAP Integration Developer In SAP
entry.content:
Good Day SAP Community,

Hope you are doing well. 

I am in the middle of my career, I started as .Net Developer and currently working as Integration Developer for NonSAP Platform. Last year, I started learning SAP BTP - Integration Suite. I completed the course "Developing with SAP Integration Suite" on SAP learning Hub.

My question is, to work with SAP Integration Suite, what I should learn more for have a good grip on the platform. Should I learn ABAB as well ?

entry.title: Distribute median calculated on year to each month
entry.content:
Hi all

I have calculated values on a monthly basis and want to report them on a monthly basis.
I would like to calculate one median of those values for the complete reporting time range and show this value on each month. So i get a fixed line with the median value.


Is this possible with an exception aggregation? I can calculate the median, but then it's calculated for each month seperately and not for the whole time series.

Thank you in advance for your help!
Stefan

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Sydney May '24
entry.content: If you are going to join this Stammtisch in Sydney, please don't forget to join the Sydney Group afterwards 😉

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello @Dany2 welcome to SAP Community and nice to meet you. You might also like to join the SAP Learning Groups including the Beginner Corner and get advice on which SAP Learning Journeys to take and so on. Simply click "join" or subscribe to any other topic using the three-dot-menu.

entry.title: Re: Line loop on Grid excluding first four lines
entry.content:
Hi Nick,

I am not sure if this is related to this issue at all, but I am suprised that this code does not error out with a different error.

One of the base principals of the DI API, although admittedly not very intuitive, is that a transaction object starts off with one empty line, which you fill in. You then only add a new empty line, if you know there will be another one coming. As you end with adding a line, your app should be complaining about having missing data.

On the other hand, you are not checking for validation from the DI API.

//Add is a function that returns an integer.
//Only if this integer is 0, is the transaction
//actually successfull
transfer.Add();

You should check for the return value from the Add function, and if it is anything other than 0, you will need to use company.GetLastError(ErrCode, ErrMsg) to check the error information returned by the company object. Please note that you need to provide an integer and a string variable for this method to fill in, which you can then read.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Why I should use SAP BW Bridge?
entry.content: Hi Deniz, still not clear regarding the existence of SAP BW Bridge in architecture, when we can connect directly to source, other than moving BW stuff to cloud.

entry.title: Re: plan order basic finish date in the past/not coincide...
entry.content:
Hello @emmayoung 

Are you sure you have replanned MRP after you have changed the project dates?

Try to run regenerative MRP for the material in question. That should rebuild procurement proposals irrespective of MRP file entries.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: user exit for me22n to make field NETPR not to be editable
entry.content:
Hi all,

Once advance payment is made against PO, again system should not allow for amendments.

Here I want to change the field NETPR to not to be editable of transaction me22n if EKBE-VGABE = 4 ( transaction event type = down payment)

how this can be done? Do I need to use any User exit? please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Run a BODS job, multiple times, parallelly.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am pretty sure that the exec() function within DS waits for some kind of carriage return. So the batch file needs to be completed before the next line gets executed.

Try putting a single exec() script into a workflow, duplicate that workflow and design it in a way that all 3 workflows containing that script get executed in parallel.

If that does not work I would try using SOAP WS and trigger the jobs via RUN_BATCH_JOB

Edit: I quickly checked the Reference Guide and confirmed - you could also use Flag 256 instead of 8.

exec('sh','/usr/sap/ADQ/dataservices/log/xyz.bat',256);  
exec('sh','/usr/sap/ADQ/dataservices/log/xyz.bat',256);
exec('sh','/usr/sap/ADQ/dataservices/log/xyz.bat',256);

As per Reference Guide

Page 1099

Use this flag to run your program independently of Data Services. Unlike flags 0-8, if you use flag 256, Data Services does not wait until the command (executable program) completes before continuing with job processing. In this case, the command runs independently of Data Services and stdout, stderr, and return code cannot be returned. Raises an exception (System function failure) if the program cannot be launched (e.g., program file not found).

Julian

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Java hybrid development in BAS
entry.content:
Finally I managed it. So CAP JAVA is taking the file default-env.json from the root of the project.

To test with mocked authentication I deleted the xsuaa object out of the VCAP_SERVICES and I was able to login with configured user and use the destination.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning: Display different periods for different...
entry.content:
Dear @eric2357,

advanced filters are not working with unbooked data.

3028328 - Unexpected columns show in table when using advanced Filter in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) 

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: SAP CDC WebSDK configuration not loading
entry.content:
Hi, completely removing the customEventMap from the child works.

Anyway, it's strange because according to the documentation, the custom logic of the parent should be merged into the child.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 - VRP-14025 - Enhancements to Comp Statements
entry.content:
Hi,

I also encountered the same issue during testing in the preview instance so I raised a ticket to SAP to reconfirm if this is a defect.

entry.title: (Wirtschafts-) Informatik studieren in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz (HS Niederrhein)
entry.content:
André Biener (AB): "Herr Prof. Dr. Daniel Retkowitz, vielen Dank, dass Sie sich für uns Zeit genommen haben als Studiengangsleiter an der Hochschule am Niederrhein, gemeinsam mit Ihren Studenten Luisa Schmitz (Studentin des Vollzeit-Bachelorprogramms) und Kiristaki Ide (Student des Teilzeit-Bachelor-Programms). Sie bieten das Studium der Wirtschaftsinformatik als Vollzeit/ Teilzeit- und Dualstudium an. Warum haben Sie sich für diese Varianten entschieden und was sind die wesentlichen Unterschiede?  

Prof. Dr. Daniel Retkowitz (DR): "Das Vollzeitstudium, die gängigste Variante, dauert 6 Semester Regelstudienzeit. Im Gegensatz dazu erfordern das duale und das Teilzeitstudium 8 Semester, da sie berufliche Ausbildungen oder Tätigkeiten integrieren. Das duale Studium an der Hochschule Niederrhein kombiniert eine zweijährige Berufsausbildung mit zwei Tagen wöchentlichem Studium und drei Tagen Unternehmensarbeit. Nach der Ausbildung kann das Studium in Vollzeit oder Teilzeit fortgesetzt werden. Das Teilzeitstudium bietet dasselbe Konzept, ermöglicht jedoch Studierenden, neben dem Studium berufstätig zu sein oder sich um Kinder oder Angehörige zu kümmern, ohne eine parallele Ausbildung zu absolvieren. Unser vielfältiges Angebot soll Studieninteressierten in verschiedenen Lebenssituationen gerecht werden. 
 

 

AB: "Digitalisierung ist ein inzwischen ein elementarer Baustein in unserem Leben. Wie machen Sie das Thema für die Studierenden begreifbar und erfahrbar?" 

DR: "Wir haben am Fachbereich eine Reihe von Einrichtungen, mit denen wir das Thema Digitalisierung in die Lehre integrieren und greifbar machen. Ein Beispiel ist das DigiLab, das Arbeitsplätze mit Lötstationen und 3D-Drucker zur Verfügung stellt. Dies kann für den Entwurf und die Umsetzung von Prototypen, zum Beispiel im Rahmen von Design Thinking, eingesetzt werden. Wir haben zudem ein Multimedia-Labor, in dem professionelle Ausstattung für Audio- und Video-Aufnahmen zur Verfügung steht. Damit werden in verschiedenen Lehrveranstaltungen durch Studierende Medieninhalte produziert. Natürlich nutzen auch die Lehrenden am Fachbereich diese Möglichkeiten. Außerdem passen wir die Inhalte unserer Lehrveranstaltungen kontinuierlich an neue Themen an. So haben wir die Themenfelder „Künstliche Intelligenz“ und „Data Science“ in den letzten Jahren entsprechend ausgebaut."

AB: "Welche Projekte oder Veranstaltungen finden im Kontext mit SAP-Lösungen statt, und ermöglichen auch Einblicke in SAP als Unternehmen? Wie versuchen Sie, den Studierenden im praktischen Ansatz Wissen und Kompetenzen zu vermitteln?" 

DR: "Sowohl in Pflichtveranstaltungen wie „Externes Rechnungswesen (mit SAP)“ und „Business Intelligence“ als auch in Wahlpflichtmodulen wie „Customizing und Programmierung von SAP-Systemen“ und „Einführung in ERP-Systeme am Beispiel SAP“ werden die theoretischen Inhalte um Hands-on Fallstudien ergänzt und ermöglichen unseren Studierenden so einen besseren Zugang zur Theorie. Häufig halten in diesen Veranstaltungen Praktiker Gastvorträge und bieten den Studierenden damit einen „Realitätscheck“."  
 

AB: "Welche Vertiefungen sind in dem Studium der Wirtschaftsinformatik bei Ihnen möglich?" 

DR: "Grundsätzlich ist der Studiengang auf ein generalistisches Studium ausgelegt. Möglichkeiten, zur Spezialisierung gibt es aber dennoch im Rahmen von Wahlpflichtmodulen. Dabei gibt es zwei Säulen. Zum einen Module zur Spezialisierung in den Wirtschaftswissenschaften und zum anderen zur Spezialisierung in der Informationstechnologie. Der Modulkatalog wird in diesen Bereichen kontinuierlich angepasst und wir bieten eine breite Palette von möglichen Themen an. Von Geschäftsprozessmanagement über Multimedia, Usability, Machine Learning bis zur IT-Sicherheit gibt es viele Möglichkeiten." 
 

AB: "Inwiefern hat die Hochschule Niederrhein Verbindungen zu Unternehmen und Industrien, die Studierenden Erfahrungen für die spätere Arbeitswelt ermöglichen können?" 

DR: "Der Kontakt zu Unternehmen ist entscheidend für anwendungsbezogene Studien. Im Deutschlandstipendium werden Studierende von regionalen Unternehmen unterstützt, was nicht nur finanzielle Hilfe, sondern auch Austauschmöglichkeiten mit den Sponsoren beinhaltet. Unsere Besonderheiten umfassen eine verpflichtende, integrierte Praxisphase von drei Monaten in Unternehmen, die wertvolle Einblicke und Erfahrungen bietet. Diese Praxisphasen können oft zu späteren Abschlussarbeiten in Kooperation mit Unternehmen führen. Gastvorträge von Praktikern in vielen Modulen bereichern die Lehrveranstaltungen, und die Gründungsinitiative HNX bietet Beratung für Gründerinnen und Gründer sowie regelmäßige Start-Up Events als alternative Option zum klassischen Berufseinstieg." 

AB: "Auf welchen Themenschwerpunkt ist die Hochschule Niederrhein besonders spezialisiert?"  

DR: "Die Hochschule Niederrhein ist eine große Hochschule für angewandte Wissenschaften. Wir haben über 13.000 Studierende, die an zehn Fachbereichen studieren. Ein besonderer Schwerpunkt der Hochschule ist dabei die Textil- und Bekleidungstechnik, die eine lange Tradition hat. Dieser Schwerpunkt ist einzigartig in Deutschland. Der Fachbereich Wirtschaftswissenschaften, an dem auch der Studiengang Wirtschaftsinformatik angesiedelt ist, ist der größte Fachbereich der Hochschule mit über 3.500 Studierenden. Dies stellt einen weiteren Schwerpunkt der Hochschule dar." 

AB: "Welche Angebote macht die Hochschule, um Erstsemester-Studierenden einen erfolgreichen Start in das Studierendenleben zu ermöglichen?" 

DR: "Die Erstsemesterwoche ist entscheidend für den Studienstart. Hier lernen neue Studierende die Campus-Einrichtungen kennen und knüpfen wertvolle Kontakte. Die Fachschaft spielt dabei eine wichtige Rolle, indem erfahrene Studierende Informationen und Tipps für einen erfolgreichen Studienbeginn weitergeben. Zusätzlich fördern verschiedene Lehrveranstaltungen im ersten Fachsemester die Vernetzung der Studierenden, wie beispielsweise das Erstsemesterprojekt, das von Anfang an die Motivation zur Zusammenarbeit stärken soll." 

AB: "Welche das Studium begleitenden Angebote der Hochschule nutzt ihr selbst oder habt in der Vergangenheit in Anspruch genommen?" 

Kiristaki Ide (KI): "Die Hochschule Niederrhein bietet Studierenden zahlreiche studienbegleitende Angebote zur Vertiefung ihres Wissens und zur Stärkung ihrer Kompetenzen. Dazu gehören Sommer- und Winterakademien, die vielfältige Seminare zu Schlüsselkompetenzen anbieten. Studierende können ihre methodischen, kommunikativen und sozialen Fähigkeiten verbessern oder vertiefen, was eine hervorragende Möglichkeit zur Weiterbildung und Ergänzung ihres Studiums darstellt." 

Luisa Schmitz (LS): "Die Hochschule bietet beispielsweise Tutorien, Verlaufsberatungen oder online Videos zur Nutzung der Bibliothek begleitend zum Studium an. Im Verlauf des Studiums stehen somit nicht nur online alle relevanten Informationen zur Verfügung, man kann sich auch zu jeder Zeit und zu jeder Thematik an andere Studierende sowie die Hochschule selbst wenden." 

AB: "Welche Veranstaltungen der Hochschule waren bisher für euch ein Highlight?" 

KI: "Die Hochschule Niederrhein nimmt an der „International Class“ teil, einem Modul, in dem Studierende mit Kommilitonen aus ausländischen Partneruniversitäten in multinationalen Teams zusammenarbeiten. Sie bearbeiten gemeinsam Fallstudien und entwickeln unternehmensbezogene Problemlösungen. Die Teilnahme ermöglicht tiefe Einblicke in die Praxis der Unternehmensführung, internationales Arbeiten und persönliche Erfahrungen mit interkultureller Zusammenarbeit. Diese ergänzende Erfahrung kann die berufliche Entwicklung der Studierenden positiv beeinflussen." 

AB: "Wie würdet Ihr die Atmosphäre an der Hochschule für und unter den Studierenden beschreiben?" 

KI: "Die Hochschule Niederrhein zeichnet sich durch eine kommunikative Atmosphäre auf Augenhöhe aus, geprägt von intensiver Zusammenarbeit. Studierende und Lehrkräfte sind hochengagiert und leidenschaftlich in ihren Fachbereichen. Dies führt zu einem offenen Dialog, in dem jeder ermutigt wird, seine Meinung zu äußern und Ideen beizutragen." 

LS: "Es herrscht ein sehr positives und gemeinschaftliches Klima unter den Studierenden an der Hochschule. Wir sind untereinander sehr gut vernetzt und unterstützen uns gegenseitig." 

AB: "Welche Module Eures Wirtschaftsinformatikstudiums haben Euch am meisten inspiriert?" 

KI: "Das Wirtschaftsinformatik-Curriculum der Hochschule Niederrhein bietet vielfältige Möglichkeiten, sich mit verschiedenen Themen auseinanderzusetzen. Besonders bemerkenswert erscheinen mir Module, die Software- und Anforderungsmanagement sowie Projektmanagement behandeln. Zu den Highlights zählen das Modul Software und Requirements Engineering, das ein solides Fundament für weiterführende Vertiefungen wie Customizing und Programmierung von SAP-Systemen sowie Softwareentwurf legt." 

LS: "Mir persönlich hat besonders das Modul Business Intelligence sehr viel gebracht, aber auch Module zur Programmierung oder Datenanalyse waren sehr lehrreich. Insgesamt habe ich in diesen Modulen herausgefunden, wo meine Stärken und Interessen liegen." 

AB: "Wo verbringen Studierende ihre Zeit außerhalb der Vorlesungen und Seminare?" 

KI: "Die Bibliothek und das Studierendencafé sind auf dem Campus beliebte Anlaufstellen. Die Bibliothek bietet einen ruhigen Ort für Einzel- oder Gruppenstudium, während das Studierendencafé ideal zum Entspannen, Treffen mit Freunden oder für Pausen zwischen den Vorlesungen ist. In Mönchengladbach gibt es zahlreiche Cafés und Restaurants mit vielfältigen kulinarischen Angeboten, sowie eine lebhafte Kunst- und Kulturszene mit Theatern, Galerien und Museen, die für jeden Geschmack etwas zu bieten haben." 

LS: "Außerhalb der Vorlesungen können wir in den Lernlandschaften oder in der Bibliothek lernen. Die Lernlandschaften sind schön und praktisch gestaltet, sodass jeder einen passenden Platz finden kann, egal ob alleine oder in einer Gruppe."  

AB: "Welche Möglichkeiten bieten Mönchengladbach/ Krefeld Studierenden mit Interesse an Kunst und Kultur?"  

LS: "Neben verschiedenen Museen, die Mönchengladbach und Krefeld zu bieten haben, möchte ich an dieser Stelle das Theater mit Standort in Mönchengladbach und in Krefeld nennen. Hier werden Musiktheater, Ballett, Schauspiel, Konzerte und auch Kinderprogramme aufgeführt, sodass für jeden etwas dabei ist." 

+++++++++++++++++

Weiterführende Links: 

https://www.hs-niederrhein.de/wirtschaftswissenschaften/studierende/vollzeit/bwi-wirtschaftsinformatik/ 

https://www.hs-niederrhein.de/dual-bwi/ 

https://www.hs-niederrhein.de/bwit/ 

https://navigator.hsnr.de/navigator/uebersicht/ 

https://www.hs-niederrhein.de/wirtschaftswissenschaften/

entry.title: Re: How to create a BRF+ rule to check date?
entry.content:
Hi Dave,

the easiest way is to use DT_ADD_YEARS in your formula (expression):

Here is expert modus, you just have to change ID of your variable:

0A5B9B1556021EEE83D048546ADBC07C > DT_ADD_YEARS ( SYS_INFO_CURRENT_DATE ( ) , 1 )

It could be, that you have to use DT_SUBSTRACT_DAY, it depends on definition what "1 year from now" is. Please also check, if the logic for leap year corresponds with definition.

You can of course use formula just for adding 1 year and then check in the rule if the result corresponds.

Best regards, Nana

entry.title: FM - PIQ_CALCULATE
entry.content:
FM - PIQ_CALCULATE is internally calling PRICING_COMPLETE.
This PRICING_COMPLETE is setting the preisfindungsart = 'F' under the loop at GKOMZ.

Because of this condition value (xkomv-kwert) is not been calculated from Perform XKOMV_BEWERTEN.

Can anyone help me out what is the exact functionality of PRICING_COMPLETE or what are the changes required to calculate condition value (xkomv-kwert) through PIQ_CALCULATE.

have you any insights on your question?

entry.title: Going Beyond Traditional Task Mining
entry.content:
What exactly is "task mining"? In the rapidly evolving landscape of enterprise software, "task mining" has emerged as a new solution category that aims to complement process mining. The general consensus is that task mining encompasses monitoring of user activities on the desktop, typically through screen scraping or object recognition, to identify automation opportunities. Many task mining solutions in the market today do just that and do it well. However, task mining can be a lot more than that.  

Process-focused organizations are often unaware that task mining can support a much wider set of use cases.  Most of these use cases require deeper analytical capabilities to produce a higher resolution view of user activities. Knoa’s task mining solution takes this approach, by supporting more detailed metrics for a broad range of use cases and business processes. 

1.     Task Mining for Help Desk Optimization: Help Desk agents need a full audit trail of user behavior inside mission critical applications in order to diagnose issues effectively. This entails being able to pinpoint user actions, identify error occurrences, assess system performance, and evaluate periods of user inactivity. The objective is to facilitate faster issue diagnosis and resolution. 

2.     Task Mining for Process Optimization: Task mining is key in streamlining process execution. Are users conforming with established process flows, are they compliant with security and regulatory requirements, are they introducing errors, are they causing delays, are they encumbered by application or process design issues? 

3.     Task Mining for User Adoption and Enablement: The adoption of new applications and processes is crucial for organizational efficiency. Task mining facilitates insights into user proficiency, identifies skill gaps, and aids in tailoring training or guidance programs to enhance overall user productivity. 

4.     Task Mining for S/4HANA and Cloud Migrations: In the context of migration projects, real-time access to user behavior analytics is essential at every stage of the migration cycle: during the blueprinting phase, during the UAT cycle as well as post-migration. Enabling proactive support during the hyper care period or measuring the business impact of IT changes are just a few of the many benefits.

Knoa's task mining solution distinguishes itself by generating granular user and task analytics, specifically tailored for SAP systems and other mission-critical applications.  

A comprehensive and versatile task mining solution needs to provide a broad set metrics, including the following: 

  • User adoption: understand how well users are adopting new applications and business processes by measuring both the user activity and inactivity  
  • User experience: understand the actual end-user experience when interacting with the software by measuring the end-to-end response time for every transaction, as well as the rate of errors  
  • User performance: understand how well users are performing their tasks (speed and quality of execution)   
  • User journeys: get a detailed log of user interactions with the software, to be able to accurately reproduce process execution flows, identify bottlenecks, and verify compliance 

When evaluating a Task Mining solution for your SAP project, consider the following key factors: 

  • Alignment with Objectives: Assess whether the task mining solution aligns with your objectives of improving process execution from both application and user perspectives. 
  • Adaptability to Changes: Ensure the task mining solution can seamlessly adapt to changes in your systems and processes, providing continuous support. 
  • Operational Efficiency: Evaluate whether the task mining solution is operational from day one, without the need for extensive instrumentation or data modeling. 
  • Scalability: Confirm that the task mining solution is scalable, eliminating the need to analyze data for only a sample group of users. 

Choosing the right task mining solution for your project is integral to realizing business benefits across various dimensions. From mitigating risks and delivering cost savings to enhancing operations and overall customer and employee experiences, a strategic task mining approach can yield substantial dividends for both Business and IT stakeholders.

Any idea?

Thank you and kind Regards, 

Minh-Ha

entry.title: Modify 'Limits' tab of PR Item using ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST
entry.content:
Hi all,

 I have a requirement to modify the values of 'Overall limit' and 'Expected value' under 'Limits' tab of PR item using BAdI ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST. I can get data from table ESUH as mentioned in https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/badi-me-process-req-cust-services-limits-data/ba-p/13277699.

But I cannot see any method to set ESUH table. Any idea to achieve this friends?

Regards,

Arun

entry.title: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content:
Thank you so much for your participation last week and the great results! I am so happy to see your drive and experimental mindsets! I also really love the inspiration I got from all your favorite recipes! I will definitely try them out! And I loved the M-AI Developer Challenge pun comment!  

This week we want to use the Document Information Extraction Python SDK to extract information from the same recipe that you used in week 1 using the custom schema you created in the Document Information Extraction UI. With the Python SDK you can implement end-to-end use cases and process documents on a large scale.

  1. Use the Python IDE of your choice, create and activate a virtual environment and install the Document Information Extraction SDK: pip install sap-business-document-processing
  2. Get your Document Information Extraction service key from your BTP trial account
  3. You will need your Schema ID which you can find in the URL of the UI when navigating to the schema you want to use.

 

  1. Send your document from week 1 to the Document Information Extraction instance via the Python script (you can use the default client)
  2. To SUBMIT your result simply reply to this discussion by pasting an image with your code and returned json like this:

Additional information:

EXAMPLE CODE

Additional information: Repository with more examples

Week 1 challenge
